title: lactuca quercina var. integrifolia
intro: Lactuca quercina var. integrifolia, also known as wild lettuce, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and sedative properties, and its medicinal properties include treating insomnia, anxiety, and restlessness. The health benefits of Lactuca quercina var. integrifolia include promoting relaxation, reducing stress, and improving sleep quality, as well as acting as a natural pain reliever. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
